title: Legal
intro: This page provides legal information related to the Exit Media Group website.

sections.heading: Site publisher
sections.body: Exit Media Group, Montreal, Quebec, Canada. Contact: info@exitmediagroup.com.

sections.heading: Hosting
sections.body: The website is hosted on secure cloud infrastructure with continuous monitoring.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: All content (text, visuals, brand identity) is protected and cannot be reproduced without prior authorization.
